tasks.subject: Task 1: test-rust → 3-platform matrix (ci.yml)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run both `cargo test` invocations on ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, and macos-latest instead of Linux only.

**Files:** Modify `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (test-rust job, lines 89–109).

**Acceptance Criteria:** matrix [ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, macos-latest] w/ fail-fast:false + runs-on: matrix.platform; apt-get guarded `if: matrix.platform == 'ubuntu-22.04'`; rust-cache key `test-rust-${{ matrix.platform }}`; both cargo test steps run on all; ci-gate unchanged; valid YAML + actionlint.

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); print('YAML OK')"`; then `gh workflow run ci.yml --ref claude/hardcore-sanderson-01a980` → 3 green test-rust legs (PR is app:false so test-rust does NOT auto-run — dispatch is the macOS proof).

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/ci.yml')); print('YAML OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test-rust matrix over [ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, macos-latest], fail-fast:false, runs-on: matrix.platform", "apt-get guarded if: matrix.platform == 'ubuntu-22.04'", "rust-cache key test-rust-${{ matrix.platform }}", "both cargo test steps on every platform", "ci-gate unchanged", "valid YAML + actionlint", "dispatched ci.yml shows 3 green test-rust legs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: publish-nexus → 3-file matrix (build.yml)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Upload Windows zip + macOS universal .dmg + Linux .AppImage to Nexus (mod 856), one matrix leg per file.

**Files:** Modify `.github/workflows/build.yml` (publish-nexus job + lead comment, lines 379–410).

**Acceptance Criteria:** strategy fail-fast:false + max-parallel:1 + matrix.include of 3 assets (suffix+label); meta filename = `STS2.Mod.Manager_${VERSION}_${{ matrix.suffix }}`; upload file_category:main, archive_existing_file:true, display_name w/ matrix.label; job still `if: tags/v` + `needs: build`; valid YAML + actionlint.

**Verify:** `python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/build.yml')); print('YAML OK')"` + logic review (suffixes → exact format-release filenames). Live validation only at next v* release — state limitation when reporting done.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/build.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/build.yml')); print('YAML OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["publish-nexus matrix fail-fast:false + max-parallel:1 over 3 assets (suffix+label)", "meta filename = STS2.Mod.Manager_${VERSION}_${{ matrix.suffix }}", "upload file_category:main, archive_existing_file:true, display_name with matrix.label", "job still if: tags/v and needs: build", "valid YAML + actionlint"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: macOS smoke checklist + Nexus doc fixes (RELEASING.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a manual macOS release smoke checklist and update runbook lines the Nexus change makes stale.

**Files:** Modify `RELEASING.md` (line 30 release-flow bullet; line 59 not-automated bullet; line 64 re-run caveat; new section after the Windows smoke section).

**Acceptance Criteria:** release-flow bullet lists all 3 Nexus files; stale 'Nexus hosts Windows only' bullet removed; re-run caveat updated for 3 files + archive_existing_file; new `## Smoke-testing the macOS build` section w/ 7-step checklist + no-WebDriver note; renders cleanly.

**Verify:** `grep -n "Smoke-testing the macOS build" RELEASING.md` (1 match); `grep -c "the Nexus page currently hosts Windows only" RELEASING.md` (0); `grep -n "universal.dmg" RELEASING.md`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["RELEASING.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n \"Smoke-testing the macOS build\" RELEASING.md; grep -c \"the Nexus page currently hosts Windows only\" RELEASING.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["release-flow bullet lists all 3 Nexus files", "stale Windows-only Nexus bullet removed", "re-run caveat updated for 3 files + archive", "new macOS smoke section with 7-step checklist + no-WebDriver note", "renders cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: File the deferred Linux-smoke follow-up issue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture the deferred Linux automated WebDriver smoke work as a tracked GitHub issue so #95 closes cleanly.

**Files:** None (GitHub action only).

**Acceptance Criteria:** new open issue 'CI: Linux automated WebDriver smoke leg (deferred from #95)' with a body summarizing the spec's Out-of-scope approach (platform-aware smoke.mjs + xvfb + WebKitWebDriver leg + ci-gate wiring).

**Verify:** `gh issue list --search "Linux automated WebDriver smoke" --state open` → the new issue appears.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "gh issue list --search \"Linux automated WebDriver smoke\" --state open", "acceptanceCriteria": ["open issue 'CI: Linux automated WebDriver smoke leg (deferred from #95)' exists with the deferred-approach body"]}
```
